highlights.text: Jaipur (2N) → Jodhpur (2N) → Udaipur (3N) Grand Palace Circuit
Luxury chauffeur SUV / executive sedan with CP breakfast plan
Complimentary private sunset boat cruise on Lake Pichola
Amber Fort, Mehrangarh Fort, Ranakpur Jain Temple

itinerary.title: Rajasthan Palace Trail
itinerary.tagline: Jaipur • Jodhpur • Udaipur — 07 Nights / 08 Days Ultra-Luxury Holiday
itinerary.overview: The Best Rajasthan Tour Package welcomes you into a refined world of unmatched heritage hospitality, magnificent palace trails, and world-class architectural marvels. This bespoke circuit connects the Pink City of Jaipur, the imposing fortress landscapes of Jodhpur, and the peaceful romantic lakes of Udaipur. Private chauffeur-driven luxury vehicle, handpicked palace properties, and TRAGUIN signature hospitality throughout. Route: Jaipur → Jodhpur via Ajmer/Pushkar → Udaipur via Ranakpur → departure. Best season: October to March.
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 07 Nights / 08 Days Rajasthan palace trail (RJ-006): Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur with Amber Fort, Mehrangarh Fort, Ranakpur Jain Temple, and Lake Pichola cruise.

highlights.text: City Palace Udaipur & Lake Pichola cruise

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur | Royal Welcome to the Pink City
days.description: Traditional royal welcome at Jaipur Airport. Transfer to handpicked luxury palace hotel. Evening walk through old city rose-pink bazaars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Historic Old City Gates, Pink City Bazaars walk
Optional Activities: Royal culinary introduction dinner
Evening Experience: Leisure time at the luxury property gardens
Overnight Stay: Jaipur (Handpicked Heritage Palace)

days.title: Jaipur Full Day Sightseeing | Majestic Forts & Crown Jewels
days.description: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal photo stop, City Palace, Jantar Mantar UNESCO site, and Jal Mahal view.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, Jal Mahal
Optional Activities: Exclusive private shopping tour for authentic jewelry and block prints
Evening Experience: Gourmet dinner at an award-winning fort restaurant
Overnight Stay: Jaipur Palace Hotel

days.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur via Ajmer/Pushkar | Scenic Highways & Sacred Faith Trails
days.description: Scenic drive to Jodhpur with en-route stop at Ajmer Dargah or Pushkar Holy Lake and Brahma Temple.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Ajmer Dargah / Pushkar Holy Lake circuit
Optional Activities: Sunset camel rides on Pushkar's gentle desert dunes
Evening Experience: Relaxation by the hotel's heritage pool
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur (Premium Palace Stay)

days.title: Jodhpur Full Day Sightseeing | Mighty Mehrangarh Citadel
days.description: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, Clock Tower, and Umaid Bhawan Museum. Walking tour through blue lanes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, Clock Tower, Umaid Bhawan Museum
Optional Activities: Adventurous zip-lining over the majestic fort battlements
Evening Experience: Romantic rooftop dinner overlooking illuminated fort walls
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur Heritage Resort

days.title: Jodhpur to Udaipur via Ranakpur | Exquisite Marble Sculptures
days.description: En-route Ranakpur Jain Temple with 1,444 uniquely carved marble pillars. Arrive Udaipur lakeside hotel.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Ranakpur Jain Temple, Aravali Valley Drive
Optional Activities: Authentic Mewari lunch stop
Evening Experience: A peaceful lakeside walk at sunset
Overnight Stay: Udaipur (Premium Handpicked Hotel)

days.title: Udaipur Palace Tour & Lake Pichola Cruise | Grand Mewar Regality
days.description: City Palace, Jagdish Temple, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, and private sunset boat cruise on Lake Pichola.
activities: Sightseeing Included: City Palace, Jagdish Temple, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, Lake Pichola Cruise
Optional Activities: Elegant evening folk dance show at Bagore Ki Haveli
Evening Experience: Fine dining at a spectacular lakeside restaurant
Overnight Stay: Udaipur Lakeside Palace

days.title: Udaipur Secondary Lakes & Hill Fort Excursion | Monsoon Palace Panoramas
days.description: Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace, Fateh Sagar Lake, Nehru Park, and boutique lakeside cafés.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sajjangarh Palace, Fateh Sagar Lake, Nehru Park
Optional Activities: Vintage Car Museum tour
Evening Experience: Custom couples' or family photography session
Overnight Stay: Udaipur Lakeside Palace

days.title: Udaipur Departure | Royal Farewell
days.description: Relaxed breakfast, optional souvenir shopping, and smooth transfer to Udaipur Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Souvenir stops and local handicraft markets
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: Luxury heritage palace accommodation across all cities
Private chauffeur-driven executive vehicle for all journeys
All parking fees, highway tolls, and driver allowances
Complimentary private sunset boat cruise on Lake Pichola
Welcome amenities and traditional garland greetings
Airfares or interstate train ticket expenses
Monument entry fees, camera fees, or local guide services
Personal expenses: mini-bar, phone calls, laundry
Optional adventure activities: zip-lining, desert safaris
Mandatory gala dinner surcharges during holiday peaks
